text.title: MLP Planning Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply MLP Planning end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: pick-wow
step.action: Choose one critical-path moment to polish.

step.name: design+ship
step.action: Design, build, ship the wow moment.

step.name: measure
step.action: Track delight signals (NPS / retweet / referral); decide repeat.
